title: leucanthemum cebennense var. ruscinonense
intro: Leucanthemum cebennense var. ruscinonense, also known as the French daisy, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). Research suggests that this plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Leucanthemum cebennense var. ruscinonense include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and potentially aid in the treatment of various health conditions. However, the herbal preparations and specific medicinal uses of Leucanthemum cebennense var. ruscinonense require further research and should be approached with caution.
